attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT DISTINCT
QUOTE_ID AS OBJECT_ID,
PARENT_ID AS DEAL_OBJECT_ID,
ERPPRICELISTID,
CREATED_BY,
CAST(LEFT(OREPLACE(CREATED_ON,'T',' '), 19) as TIMESTAMP(0)) AS CREATED_ON,
UPDATED_BY,
CAST(LEFT(OREPLACE(UPDATED_ON,'T',' '), 19) as TIMESTAMP(0)) AS UPDATED_ON,
ACTIVE,
COALESCE (NET_PRICE_DEAL,'=') AS NET_PRICE_DEAL,
FRAME_AGREEEMENT,
SOURCE_TYPE,
PROD_PRICING_COMMENT,
SERV_PRICING_COMMENT,
PRICELISTID as PRICE_LIST_ID,
NULL as INACTIVE_OBJECT_ID,
BOM_STATE,
CAST(CAST(LAST_PRICED_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YYYY') AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS LAST_PRICED_DATE,
CART_ID,
SITE_OBJECT_ID,
BOM_SOURCE,
CONTRACTUAL_DISC,
CAST(CAST(QUOTE_IMPORT_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'DD-MM-YYYY') AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS QUOTE_IMPORT_DATE,
QUOTE_ID,
QUOTE_NAME,
TRADEIN_STATE,
CBN_STATUS,
CBN_DISTI_ID,
IS_Q2O_ELIGIBLE,
NULL as DISCOUNT_SUMMARY,
AUTO_NEGOTIATE_NS,
CBN_SPLIT_ELIGIBLE,
IS_DISTI_Q2O_ELIGIBLE,
TAB_FLAG,
TAB_SUBTRACK,
TAB_PERIOD,
NULL as PRICE_BOOK_ID, --CCW:EOL OBject
CURRENCYCODE,
PRICE_LIST_NAME,
BILLING_TERM, 
FULFILLMENT_TYPE,
FULFILLMENT_SOURCE_ID,
NULL as IRONPORT_FLAG,
NULL as PRICED_FOR_AUTH,
COPY_FROM_QUOTE,
QUOTE_STATUS,
INTENDED_USE,
QUOTE_CATEGORY,
CAST(CAST(QUOTE_EXPIRATION_DATE AS DATE FORMAT  'DD-MMM-YYYY') AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS QUOTE_EXPIRATION_DATE,
CASE WHEN IS_STRINGENT = 'True' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END as IS_STRINGENT,
CASE WHEN IS_FINALIZED = 'True' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END as  IS_FINALIZED,
CUSTOMER_CATALOG_FLAG,
IS_FA_FLAG,
FA_DEAL_ID,
FEDERAL_FLG,
TAA_FLG,
'N' AS IS_ERATE_DEAL,--CCW:EOL OBject
NULL AS RN,
QUOTE_STATUS_NAME,
COALESCE (INCREMENTAL_DISCOUNT_FLG,'') AS INCREMENTAL_DISCOUNT_FLG,
'Y' AS GDR_FLAG,
STD_INCR_FLAG,
CRP_FLAG,
LEAD_PARTNER_TYPE,
LEAD_PARTNERS,
UPDATED_BY_KAFKA,
CAST(LEFT(OREPLACE(UPDATED_ON_KAFKA,'T',' '), 19) as TIMESTAMP(0)) AS UPDATED_ON_KAFKA,
OFFSET_NUMBER,
PARTITION_NUMBER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) as EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER as EDW_CREATE_USER, MESSAGE_SEQUENCE_NUMBER,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
COALESCE (IS_PCM, 'FALSE') AS IS_PCM
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_INT_CQ_SNGL_QUTE_VW_KFKA_FF  ST
Where NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM 
$$ETLVWDB.EL_INT_CQ_SNGL_QUOTE_VW_KFKA EL
WHERE 
/*ST.PARENT_ID  = EL.DEAL_OBJECT_ID  --COMMENTED AS PART OF CCW DATA FIX AUG REL */
CAST(ST.QUOTE_ID AS DECIMAL(18,0))  = EL.OBJECT_ID  /* ADDED AS PART OF CCW DATA FIX AUG REL */
AND ST.MESSAGE_SEQUENCE_NUMBER = EL.MESSAGE_SEQUENCE_NUMBER
)
